name: p-flow
description: Disciplined task development flow for Claude Code: secrets deny-list, Conventional Commits + <type>/<slug> branches, spec templates, and a skill+agent stack for brainstorm → plan → verify → review → push. Commands: init, task-start, task-end. Skills: init, task-brainstorming, writing-plan, verification-before-completion, requesting-code-review, requesting-task-review. Subagents: code-reviewer, task-reviewer.
